prompt: A single ancient massive tree filling the entire frame, split visually down the center. Left half — skeletal, bare, ash grey branches, crumbling bark, stormy dark sky. Right half — dense emerald and gold leaves, warm amber dawn light, tiny blossoms. At the base, exposed glowing roots span the full width. Emerging from the roots on the right side, human silhouettes — elders and children — hands raised, passing something luminous between them like a flame. The left side has a single lone silhouette walking away into darkness. No text, no labels, no charts. Single frame. Hyper-detailed, cinematic, emotionally resonant, magazine cover quality, chiaroscuro lighting.
dataset_name: UNESCO Atlas of the World's Languages in Danger
insight: Despite hundreds of languages falling silent each decade, revitalization movements in communities like Hawaii and New Zealand prove that no language is beyond saving.
